name: AUTOSCOPE TECHNOLOGIES CORP
summary: PART I Reorganization On July 21, 2021, a holding company reorganization was completed (the Reorganization) in which Image Sensing Systems, Inc . ("ISNS") became a wholly-owned subsidiary of the new parent company named Autoscope Technologies Corporation (" Autoscope "), which became the successor issuer to ISNS. As a result of the Reorganization, Autoscope replaced ISNS as the public company trading on the Nasdaq Stock Market under the ticker symbol AATC, and outstanding shares of ISNSs common ...
